sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Thupha guah bang hong zuk ka za, Nang nong piak hi, Topa aw;
Keigaw tak gam hing kiksak ta, Kei
Kei tung zong, kei tung zong, Kei tung zong hong zusak

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mawhna tawh ka kidim zongin, Hong paisan ke’n Topa aw;
Kei mah zong, kei mah zong,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong kheng kei in maw, ka Honpa, Nang hong itsak beelsak in;
lunggulh ta, Topa aw, kei hong sam in.
Kei mah zong, Kei mah zong, Topa aw, kei hong sam

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Hong kheng kei in, Kha Siangtho aw,
Kei zong thupha hong pia in.
Kei mah zong, kei mah zong,

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Pasian’ itna kipin siangtho, Jesuh’ sisan manpha
Pasian’ hehpihna’n mong nei lo, Kei sung hong kilang tahen.

sections.label: Verse 6
lines: A mangthangte Na khop laitak, Na ang sungah hong
Nuntakna tui a phul laitak, Kei zong thupha hong pia in.
Kei tung thupha hong pia in.
